settings.title: Settings
settings.pageSubtitle: Interface language, download and edit translation JSON files.
settings.languageHint: Choose a language or upload a custom JSON file (UTF-8).
settings.uploadHint: One JSON file per language (meta + strings). New languages appear in the list immediately.
settings.importError: Could not load the language file.
settings.editorHint: Edit strings in JSON (UTF-8). After save the interface refreshes automatically. Editing a built-in language saves a local copy in the browser.
settings.stripActions: Download · Edit · Save JSON — interface refreshes after save.

app.title: Fleet Manager
app.subtitle: Driver cost verification
app.footer: Xelto Express · Fleet Manager · UiPath Coded Web App

banner.invoiceRequestSuccess: Invoice correction request sent. Driver will see a notification in Driver App (status: Action Required).
banner.driverCorrected: Driver updated the submission — marked as Driver Corrected.
banner.driverAlert: Driver corrected submission {id}… — status: Driver Corrected
banner.driverCorrectedBannerText: The driver updated the submission — verify the invoice and approve or reject.

claims.actionsHint: Approve/Reject saves Status in DPD_POC. „Request invoice” sets Action Required and notifies Driver App. After correction the driver appears as Driver Corrected.
claims.noSelection: Select a row from the register to view details.
claims.selectRowInvoice: Select a row to view details and invoice.
claims.awaitingDriverText: Invoice correction requested. The driver will see a notification in Driver App.
claims.openDriverApp: Open Driver App for this submission
claims.defaultInvoiceMessage: Please correct the invoice — attach a legible document matching the declared service and vehicle registration.
claims.noFilterMatchGlobal: No rows match filters (searched {count} records in database).
claims.noFilterMatchPage: No rows match filters ({count} records on page).
claims.analysisProgressMultiple: Analysis in progress ({count} cases) — click to choose
claims.analysisDiscoverFailed: Maestro instance not found — refresh shortly or run analysis manually.
claims.invoiceMissing: Attachment not found (Invoice File / InvoiceFile field in Data Fabric).

filters.title: Search and filters
filters.searchPlaceholder: Text, tax ID, vehicle, service, record ID…
filters.companyHint: Dictionary DPD_B2B_Courier_Companies. „Vehicles” column shows fleet vehicles assigned to the company.
filters.vehicleHint: Vehicles: DPD_B2B_Vehicles. Company and region from Data Fabric dictionaries and POC costs.

vehicles.selectHint: Select a vehicle from the list.
vehicles.selectHintLong: Select a vehicle from the list (B2B) to see region, company and related DPD_POC costs.
vehicles.openClaims: Open claims register for this vehicle
vehicles.noCosts: No POC costs for this registration.
vehicles.clickCostHint: Click a cost row to open the submission with invoice and manager decision.
vehicles.loading: Loading vehicles and region / company dictionaries…

companies.title: Courier companies
companies.selectHint: Select a company from the list.
companies.selectHintLong: Select a company to view cost statistics, health score and fleet vehicles.
companies.noVehicles: No vehicles assigned to this company in fleet catalog.
companies.clickRegistration: Click registration to open Vehicles tab.

auth.title: Fleet Manager
auth.subtitle: Sign in with your UiPath account to verify driver costs.
auth.accountError: Account error (401) — signed-in account has no access to staging org or DefaultTenant.
auth.oauthFailed: OAuth login failed. Check Redirect URI in External Application — it must match the app URL exactly (no ?errorCode= parameters).
auth.loginLead: Sign in to UiPath (staging) to browse driver costs from Data Fabric.

dashboard.title: Fleet dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Cost summary, service categories and decisions from DPD_POC register
dashboard.riskSubtitle: Claims with AI score or fraud flag — click to open details.
dashboard.noRisk: No claims with analysis result or risk flag.

insights.title: Insights — risk analysis
insights.subtitle: Suspicious cost and vehicle detection: flags, Maestro AI, amount anomalies, and repeat patterns.
insights.empty: No suspicious claims — criteria expanded: flags, AI, high costs vs fleet median.
insights.selectHint: Select a claim to see risk signals and AI analysis.
insights.hint: Showing {count} claims — scoring combines flags, AI, cost vs median, and vehicle history.
insights.medianHint: Fleet cost median: {median} PLN — claims above 145% of median are marked as high cost.
insights.noFilterMatch: No claims match the selected filters.

analysis.title: AI analysis result
analysis.empty: No analysis for this claim. Run Maestro („Analyze current”) or check Risk/Score fields in Data Fabric.

highCost.label: High average cost
highCost.detail: Avg {avg} PLN vs fleet median {median} PLN

preview.empty: No invoice file for this record (File field in Data Fabric).

history.title: Vehicle submission history
history.empty: No history for registration {registration} in DPD_VehicleFlags. Vehicle ID must match registration number.
